title: A5-nl — NL-boundary leg, code vertical: deterministic mapper-a1-hybrid front-end parse of blind held-out NL phrasings of the frozen a5 eval vs the measured gold-parse ceiling, engine re-verified behaviourally parent-perfect in-run by gate G2 + byte-identical kot_code desugaring (HA5 NL analog of HL3a clause 2)

dependent_vars.name: n_covered_exact
dependent_vars.definition: covered NL phrasings whose front-end parse the engine answers with status=answer, value equal to the pre-authored expected value, provenance ids all present in the code world store, non-empty axiom license (scored exactly as the frozen parent a5)

dependent_vars.name: n_covered_refused
dependent_vars.definition: covered phrasings refused at any stage (ERR_PARSE with stage tag, or engine ERR_*) — the SAFE half of the fail-closed split; reported by stage

dependent_vars.name: n_covered_answered_wrong
dependent_vars.definition: covered phrasings answered with a value != expected (mis-parse converted into a confident wrong answer) — the DANGEROUS half, gated (S2)

dependent_vars.name: n_control_refused_acceptable
dependent_vars.definition: included control phrasings (malformed stratum excluded, FK-NLB-5) refused with the pre-authored expected engine ERR_* code OR ERR_PARSE (FK-NLB-6); strict engine-code match reported descriptively

dependent_vars.name: n_control_answered
dependent_vars.definition: included control phrasings answered at all (fail-closed breach on the control slice)

dependent_vars.name: dev_abstention_rate
dependent_vars.definition: front-end parse-failure rate on the 60-item DEV phrasing set (instrument gate G4, bound 0.20)

dependent_vars.name: frontend_total_ns
dependent_vars.definition: wall-clock for one full mapper-parse pass on the pinned r0 box (descriptive)

n_planned.scope: HA5 NL-PARSE LEG ONLY, code vertical. Frozen parent eval reused byte-identically: 855 covered + 106 control (parent's 122 minus the 16-item malformed stratum, excluded by FK-NLB-5). One blind held-out NL phrasing per included query (K=1, FK-NLB-4) + 60 DEV phrasings over FRESH minted identities disjoint from every scored item (ASM-0145), authored under the design doc section-5 blind protocol, + a 60-item no-keyword synonym PROBE (descriptive only, never gated, FK-NLB-8/ASM-0144). REGISTERED HONESTY NOTE: on this vertical the mapper's lexicon leg is thin — the seven relational ops are carried by frame keywords + identifier gazetteer and the mapper's concept mapping decides only the instance-of concept slot; a5-nl therefore stresses frame+entity-linking, l3a-parse stresses lexicon mapping; each licenses only its vertical. No model, no GPU, no LLM arm, no cost claim, no head-to-head engine-vs-LLM claim.
n_planned.seed_note: front-end and engine are RNG-free; seed 0 pins the deranged arm's fixed-point-free permutation (op->op derangement + concept targets on this vertical, because the op keywords carry the relational semantics)
n_planned.successors: on PASS: the NL leg may be included in any a5-llm re-freeze; on FAIL: parser-stage successor per FK-NLB-3, never more GPU (kill routing). MANDATORY FK-NLB-11 REUSE CAVEAT (ASM-0423, design doc 14.4): any successor with a MODEL-BASED arm (e.g. an a5-llm re-freeze) MUST exclude or re-phrase the 28 waived_forced_substring qids listed in data/nlb-phrasings-a5/lint-receipt.json — those items carry the answer surface inside the mandatory verbatim entity identifier (nested-definition + self-recursion semantics), which a deterministic surface-blind pipeline cannot exploit but an LLM can read the answer off the question. The lint exemption is lawful ONLY for this record's non-model arms, and the guard is FAIL-CLOSED in the pinned nlb_lint.py (design doc 14.8 item 11, ASM-0621): the DEFAULT --arms-profile model blocks green on a nonempty waived list, so a model-arm successor re-running the pinned lint is refused unless it re-phrases or excludes the waived qids; the deterministic-r0 attestation is unlawful for any record with a model arm.

arms_mandatory_baselines: gold-replication (measured-ceiling arm: parent's gold queries on the engine that ACTUALLY RUNS — NOT byte-identical to the parent-frozen pin, design doc 10.9 — plus the byte-identical kot_code desugar layer; must reproduce the parent-perfect 855/855 + 122/122 in-run — instrument gate G2, which IS this record's engine-continuity claim, ASM-0147)

deranged-lexicon (scramble control, R0 analog of shuffled-kernel: seed-pinned fixed-point-free derangement of op->relation bindings + concept-URN targets; retained exactness must collapse < 0.10 — instrument gate G5)
abstain-all + answer-all (trivial-policy brackets as in the frozen parent). Kernel-as-text null NOT instantiable at R0 (no model) — same registered adaptation as the frozen parents.

endpoints.test: mapper-parse covered-exact rate over the 855 frozen covered queries (one blind NL phrasing each), one-sided Wilson 95% LB (z=1.645, kot_common formula) vs floor 0.90. Retained-fraction form is identical to absolute rate because the gold ceiling is MEASURED at 855/855 (registry/verdicts/a5.json) — non-inferiority margin 0.10 vs measured ceiling 1.0; F2 degenerate-denominator lesson discharged by construction. Floor = ceiling minus the pre-declared 10% maximum NL-boundary loss (ASM-0141, the HA5 analog of HL3a clause 2's 'pre-declared fraction'). Planning value 0.95 (LB 0.9363; corrected from the draft's 0.9351 at freeze-candidate recomputation).

Holm family member 1 of 2 (family alpha 0.05, one-sided): included-control acceptable-refusal rate (expected engine code OR ERR_PARSE; FK-NLB-6) vs gate 0.90 over n=106. GATE LEVEL 0.90 NOT 0.95 (FK-NLB-7): at n=106 a 0.95 gate is undecidable under the Holm-worst-case bound (only a perfect 106/106 passes — fails the P8 section-1.6 lint); 0.90 passes from 102/106. Planning value 0.99 (Holm-worst z=1.96 LB 0.9476; corrected from the draft's 0.9640 at freeze-candidate recomputation). Strict engine-code rate and refused-any reported descriptively.

Holm family member 2 of 2: covered mis-parse->wrong-answer rate one-sided Wilson UB vs gate 0.02 over n=855. Planning value 4/855 (UB 0.0120 at z=1.96; corrected from the draft's 0.0132 at freeze-candidate recomputation). Independent kill leg: unadjusted Wilson LB >= 0.02 is a FAIL rule (fires from 24/855; the draft's 25 was an off-by-one, corrected). WILSON_GATE DECLARATION NOTE (design doc 14.8 item 7): the gate block is declared in complement form (expected_rate 0.995, threshold 0.98) because the RT-4 constraint-9 checker powers LB-exceeds-threshold gates only; by the Wilson complement identity LB(1-p,n,z) == 1-UB(p,n,z) this is the IDENTICAL gate — the tested quantity remains the wrong-answer rate UB < 0.02 with unchanged boundaries.

descriptive, no threshold: ERR_PARSE distribution over {gazetteer-miss, mapper-abstain, frame-miss, frame-ambiguous} + label-verbatim vs paraphrase exactness stratification — the stage-indictment instrument a FAIL must cite. The 60-item no-keyword synonym probe (/analysis/synonym_probe) is reported alongside, descriptive ONLY, never gated, carved out of the envelope (FK-NLB-8/ASM-0144).
descriptive: mean front-end+engine microseconds per phrasing on the pinned r0 box; no cost-ratio claim is tested in this record.

kill_criterion_verbatim: HA5 NL analog of HL3a clause 2 (architecture-ladder.md section 5.1; the a5 frozen record routes the NL-parse kill to this successor verbatim): mapper-parse losing more than the pre-declared fraction of gold-parse accuracy means the NL boundary eats the rung on the code vertical — fix the parser stage, not the narrative, and spend nothing on GPU for this leg. THIS RECORD instantiates the fraction at 10% absolute: FAIL iff the mapper-parse covered-exact one-sided Wilson 95% UB <= 0.90, OR the covered wrong-answer one-sided Wilson 95% LB >= 0.02 (fail-closed demonstrably broken). The LLM-comparison kill belongs to a5-llm and cannot be decided here.
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Measured range: R0 — no host model; ONE deterministic front-end build (mapper a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838…, one identifier gazetteer, one frozen frame rule set), ONE blind agent-authored held-out phrasing set (K=1 per query, design-doc section-5 protocol), the parents' frozen eval/stores byte-identical, the kot_code desugar layer byte-identical to the parent pin, and the ENGINE behaviourally parent-perfect on the parent eval, re-verified IN-RUN by gate G2 (the engine sha differs from the parent-frozen pin — design doc 10.9 / 14.8 item 8, ASM-0147; no engine byte-identity is claimed), ONE 15-file Python snapshot corpus. A PASS licenses only: the closed kot-query-code/1 grammar is reachable from THESE held-out NL phrasings by a deterministic training-free front-end with <=10% covered-exactness loss and an intact fail-closed contract, on the code vertical. It licenses NO natural-user-distribution robustness claim, NO other codebase or programming language, NO other phrasing distribution, NO extraction-soundness claim w.r.t. runtime semantics (ASM-0009 unchanged), NO LLM-comparative accuracy or cost claim, NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model, and NO cross-vertical conjunction (l3a-parse licenses the family/world vertical separately). A FAIL indicts the named front-end stage and routes investment to the parser, not GPU.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

reuse_overrides.reason: DELIBERATE FRESH RE-RUN of the trivial-policy cells (abstain-all / answer-all, R0) that the parents' results logs already hold at mechanically indeterminate pins (producers a5, a5-llm, l3a): reuse-permission is DEFERRED programme-wide (resource-optimization-plan.md section 3 interlock, ERR_P2_REUSE_UNRATIFIED), and the logged rows could not serve as this record's arm outputs even in principle - in this record the trivial policies run over the held-out NL PHRASINGS through the pinned front-end (answer-all parses each phrasing, then fabricates deterministically where the pipeline would refuse; abstain-all refuses each PHRASING), whereas every logged parent row ran over gold STRUCTURED queries with no NL front-end in the loop; the cells are $0 deterministic CPU work re-executed fresh under this record's G0/G6/G7 gates (design doc 14.8 item 7)
